title: Volunteer Opportunities * Domestic Violence Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Volunteer Opportunities * Domestic Violence Issues 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Autism Spectrum Disorder Child Abuse Issues Disaster/Emergency Issues Domestic Violence Issues Foster Children Homelessness Issues Seasonal Workers Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF THE HARBOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a day center, domestic and sexual violence advocacy, culturally specific LGBTQ2+ and Latinx services, relocation assistance, transportation to a safe location, accompaniment to medical or forensic exams, assistance applying for Crime Victims Compensation, and information and referral to community agencies. Provides educational programs. These programs focus on raising awareness about the dynamics of domestic and sexual violence, understanding trauma, and promoting prevention strategies within the community. Currently accepting volunteers. 801 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Age 14 and older Hours: Advocacy Office: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-4pm, Wednesday 9am-noon, closed 1st Wednesday of every month. Online Chat and Text: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email (503) 325-5735 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE HARBOR THE HARBOR
